archive_data.question_text: Who was defeated by Chandragupta Maurya in order to found the Maurya dynasty?

explanation.english: Chandragupta Maurya defeated Dhana Nanda, the last ruler of the Nanda dynasty, with the help of Chanakya to establish the Maurya Empire around 322 BCE.
explanation.tanglish: Chandragupta Maurya, Chanakya de uthaviyoda Dhana Nanda vaithu veththu Maurya samrajathai thondriyanar.

archive_data.question_text: Any dispute between the Government of India and one or more States or between the Government of India and any State or States comes under ___________________ jurisdiction of the Supreme Court of India.

explanation.english: Article 131 of the Indian Constitution provides for the Exclusive Original Jurisdiction of the Supreme Court in disputes involving the Government of India and State governments.
explanation.tanglish: Article 131 anusarippu, Kendra arasu matrum State arasu idaiyana vadagaathi kargalukku Supreme Court Exclusive Original jurisdiction udaiyathu.

archive_data.question_text: Kajli Teej is the cultural festival of which Indian state?

explanation.english: Kajli Teej is a traditional cultural festival celebrated mainly in Rajasthan, particularly in the Bundi region, during the monsoon season.
explanation.tanglish: Kajli Teej Rajasthan maanilathin samudhaya uthsavam, visheshamaga Bundi paaguthiyil mazhai kaalamil aatchikappadum.

archive_data.question_text: In whose presence does the Governor take oath or make affirmation in case of the absence of the Chief Justice of the High Court?

options.text: Senior-most judge of High Court available

explanation.english: According to Article 159 of the Constitution, in the absence of the Chief Justice of the High Court, the Governor takes oath in the presence of the senior-most available judge of that High Court.
explanation.tanglish: Article 159 anusarippu, High Court Chief Justice illaiyel, avalvil irukindra Senior-most judge munbu Governor sapatham edupar.

archive_data.question_text: What is the slogan of the Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana?

explanation.english: The official slogan of Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) launched in 2014 is 'Mera Khata, Bhagya Vidhata' which means 'My Account, Fortune Maker'.
explanation.tanglish: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojanavin adhikariyalana slogan 'Mera Khata, Bhagya Vidhata' aagum.

archive_data.question_text: According to Census 2011 of India, which religion recorded highest literacy rate from following?

explanation.english: According to Census 2011, Jains recorded the highest literacy rate of 87.4% among all religious communities in India.
explanation.tanglish: 2011 Census anusarippu, India ullil Jain madham thaan highest literacy rate (87.4%) adaithullathu.

archive_data.question_text: In 1932, the Poona Pact was signed between Mahatma Gandhi and _________.

explanation.english: The Poona Pact was signed on September 24, 1932, between Mahatma Gandhi and Dr. B.R. Ambedkar at Yerwada Central Jail, Pune, regarding the representation of depressed classes in the legislature.
explanation.tanglish: 1932 September 24-il Mahatma Gandhi matrum Dr. B.R. Ambedkar idaiyil Yerwada Central Jail, Pune-il Poona Pact podhikka pattathu, arasalaiyil dalit prajkalin pratinidhithuvukkaaga.
